title: Gov’t to set up SUN auction tomorrow, eyeing IDR 22 trillion this time
body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) tomorrow (20/8), with an indicative target of IDR 20 trillion.

title: CNTX to go private, setting tender to IDR 400 per share
body: PT Century Textile Industry Tbk (CNTX) will go private after securing the approval from its shareholders on September 25, 2024. This issuer reported a deficit in equity of USD 21.58 million in the first half of 2024.

title: Morning session saw IHSG fluctuating
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen fluctuating since the opening bell until 11 AM WIB today (19/8).

title: First half in, BRMS’s performance took off
body: Throughout the first half (H1) of 2024, PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) skyrocketed compared to the same period last year.

title: Indo Boga Sukses saw net profit grew 14.2% in H1 2024
body: PT Indo Boga Sukses Tbk (IBOS) booked net profit of IDR 4.84 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 14.2% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Gov’t to set up SUN auction tomorrow, eyeing IDR 22 trillion this time
body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) tomorrow (20/8), with an indicative target of IDR 20 trillion.

title: CNTX to go private, setting tender to IDR 400 per share
body: PT Century Textile Industry Tbk (CNTX) will go private after securing the approval from its shareholders on September 25, 2024. This issuer reported a deficit in equity of USD 21.58 million in the first half of 2024.

title: Morning session saw IHSG fluctuating
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen fluctuating since the opening bell until 11 AM WIB today (19/8).

title: First half in, BRMS’s performance took off
body: Throughout the first half (H1) of 2024, PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) skyrocketed compared to the same period last year.

title: Indo Boga Sukses saw net profit grew 14.2% in H1 2024
body: PT Indo Boga Sukses Tbk (IBOS) booked net profit of IDR 4.84 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 14.2% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: UFOE opens the 26th UFO Elektronika outlet in Malang
body: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk (UFOE) has reportedly opened its latest UFO Elektronika store in Malang, East Java.

title: Revenue soaring 29,4%, CASS saw profit nearly doubled in H1 2024
body: PT Cardig Aero Services Tbk (CASS), a holding company of airport handling services, reported double-digit growth in revenue to IDR 1.3 trillion in H1 2024.

title: Costs of sales swelled, Lion Metal Works’ loss worsened
body: PT Lion Metal Works Tbk (LION), the company producing steel plates, reported a loss of IDR 1.59 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Turning back from losses, BTEL scored IDR 7.1 billion of profit in first half
body: PT Bakrie Telecom Tbk (BTEL), a telecommunication company under Bakrie Group, booked net profit of IDR 7.1 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: DSSA to issue bond and sukuk phase III, totalling IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA) announces the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond I of DSSA Phase III Year 2024 and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I of DSSA Phase III Year 2024, with total principal of IDR 2 trillion.

title: Efficiency allows Citi Indonesia to book 14% surge in H1 2024 net profit
body: Citibank N.A. Indonesia, or widely known as Citi Indonesia, reported solid growth in its net profit performance in the first half (H1) of 2024, increasing 14% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Representing Indonesia, BCA wins 6 international awards in a month
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BCA) has, once again, achieved various achievements throughout July 2024. Not only within domestic scope, BCA has also received various international awards on numerous occasions.

title: Manunggal Prime Development acquired 707 million Alam Sutera Realty (ASRI) shares
body: PT Manunggal Prime Development acquired 707.20 million shares of PT Alam Sutera Realty Tbk (ASRI), a property developer, on Tuesday, August 13. With the most recent transaction, this investor's share portion increased to 26.81% from its previous approximate holding of 23.21%.

title: MNC Digital Entertainment to hold stock split with 1:5 ratio
body: PT MNC Digital Entertainment Tbk (MSIN), an entertainment company under MNC Group, is preparing for a stock split with a ratio of 1:5.

title: IPCC reported 2.24% increase in profit in H1 2024
body: PT Indonesia Kendaraan Terminal Tbk (IPCC) scored net profit of IDR 80.69 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 2.24% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Net remains remains in green zone at 875.54 million shares
body: Foreign share purchase transactions remained at a high level on Tuesday, August 13, with the foreign buy volume at 2.59 billion shares. Meanwhile, the foreign sales volume was just about 1.71 billion shares. As a result, foreign net volume remained in the green zone, closing at 875.54 million shares.

title: BTPN pairs up with Syailendra Capital to offer mutual funds via app
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) has formed a strategic partnership with Syailendra Capital in order to improve stock market literacy and inclusivity, particularly mutual fund products.

title: Mayora Indah’s net profit soared 40.92% in the first half
body: PT Mayora Indah Tbk (MYOR) booked net profit of IDR 1.71 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 40.92% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Bukaka Teknik Utama to establish a joint venture, investing IDR 7 billion
body: PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), a construction and manufacturing company, has partnered with PT Bangun Daya Utama (BDU) to establish two new joint ventures.

title: Tigaraksa Satria divests portion in Gramedia Digital Nusantara
body: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk (TGKA) has divested the entire portion of its shares in PT Gramedia Digital Nusantara (GDN) to PT Digital Intisari Nusantara (DIN).

title: Investors’ interest in state sukuks keeps declining
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk last Tuesday (13/8) reached IDR 17.97 trillion.

title: 249 million Energi Mega Persada (ENRG) shares released by Shima Global
body: PT Shima Global Kapital released 249 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) on Monday, August 12. Prior to selling these shares, the investor owned about 22.09% of the shares of this oil and gas trading and exploration issuer, but now only 21.09% is left. This transaction was made possible by PT KB Valbury Sekuritas and PT OCBC Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: GEMS distributes capital injection of IDR 274.78 billion to 2 subsidiaries
body: PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS), a coal mining company belonging to the Sinar Mas Group, has distributed capital injections amounting to IDR 274.78 billion for its 2 subsidiaries.

title: Weakening revenue, ITMG’s profit eroded 58%
body: The revenue of PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) slipped as far as 19.2% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 1.05 billion at the end of June 2024.

title: Operational costs swelled, ZONE saw 65.5% decline in net profit
body: PT Mega Perintis Tbk (ZONE), a retail specialised in clothing, booked net profit of IDR 15.01 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Smartfren Telecom’s loss streak continues, now losing IDR 473.8 billion in the first half
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) booked another loss of IDR 473.8 billion in the first half of 2024, following its loss in H1 2023 of IDR 108.93 billion.

title: Suwarna Arta owns nearly 50% Mega Manunggal Property (MMLP) after acquiring 1.78 billion shares
body: On Friday, August 9, investor PT Suwarna Arta Mandiri increased its ownership stake in PT Mega Manunggal Property, a warehouse provider that caters to the demands of the real estate sector. Through PT Indo Premier Sekuritas, this investor purchased 1.78 billion shares in total, causing its share portion to soar from 23.39% to 49.24%.

title: Foreign investors buy up Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares, net foreign volume surplus at 441.21 million shares
body: On Monday, August 12, foreign investors purchased 1.42 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of 79.06 million shares. Through this transaction, foreign purchase volume jumped to 3 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled 2.56 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 441.21 million shares.

title: JCI saw continuous uptrend throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) throughout Tuesday (13/8) shifted positively, picking up the positive trend shown yesterday’s (12/8) afternoon.

title: Enhancing efficiency, MTMH to acquire suppliers of laboratory and pharmaceutical equipment
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the managing company of Murni Teguh Hospital, has acquired PT Gamaliel Elia Tua (GET), a company engaged in the wholesale of laboratory and pharmaceutical equipment.

title: CMNP obtains financing facility of IDR 4 trillion from SMI
body: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk (CMNP), a toll road company, has acquired a sharia financing facility from PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (Persero).

title: SGER’s profit shrank 21.73%
body: The net profit of PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER) was seen declining 21.73% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half (H1) of 2024 despite its 24.36% yoy growth in revenue.

title: MLPT to allocate interim dividend of IDR 206.25 billion
body: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT) will distribute interim dividend for the fiscal year 2024 of IDR 206.25 billion.

title: Bank Ina to join hands with Bahana Artha Ventura for MSME financing
body: PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk (BINA) has officially formed a strategic partnership with PT Bahana Artha Ventura (BAV) in order to support the expansion of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs).

title: PPGL to distribute interim dividend of IDR 4.54 per share
body: PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk (PPGL), a freight-forwarding company, plans to allocate interim dividend of IDR 3.5 billion or IDR 4.54 per share.
